texto: You’re going to turn the next page, because you still have hope. You hope there’s a little something more, and it’s nothing personal. People do it at the end of every book. I think that’s why publishers put in all those extra pages. So you have a chance to shuffle and flip through them while it sinks in. It’s over. The trip is done.You know it’s over, but you’re going to turn the page anyway.
explicacao: Citação de Rory Harrison sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You’re going to turn the next page, because you still have hope. You hope there’s a little someth…” articula reflexao, end-of-books, reading em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reading.

I think that’s why publishers put in all those extra pages. So you have a chance to shuffle and flip through them while it sinks in. It’s over. The trip is done.You know it’s over, but you’re going to turn the page anyway.
